title: Paarin Minor

{{Quote|The Koorivar have done a good job with their weather machines. Whipped up one brute of a sky. We used the same tactic on Paarin Minor. Drew the Seps into fabricated clouds and blew them to the back of beyond.|[[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]]|<ref name="Novel">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>}}
'''Paarin Minor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A stronghold of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was the target of an [[Battle of Paarin Minor|unsuccessful attack]] by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. It later fell within the territory of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and eventually within [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] [[Imperial Remnant]] from [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] to [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

==Description==
Paarin Minor was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Paarin Minor system/Legends|Paarin Minor system]] of the [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]], which was located in the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The world laid along the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]].<ref name="GTW" />

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Paarin Minor was a stronghold of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]],<ref name="CSWE" /> and in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it served as the headquarters of the [[Ninth Army|Ninth Sector Army]], which was commanded by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Denn Wessex]].<ref name="GTW" /> At some point between 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the Separatists attempted to [[Battle of Paarin Minor|conquer]] the planet. However, the Republic forces used a [[Weather-control station|weather-generation machine]] to create an artificial cloud cover that screened its [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] from the Separatist forces. When the Separatists broke free of the cloud-screen, they were surprised by Republic [[Laser/Legends|fire]] and forced to flee after sustaining heavy casualties.<ref name="CSWE" />

After the end of the Clone Wars, Paarin Minor belonged to the territory of the newly-formed successor regime of the Republic, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="GTW" /> which fragmented in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the planet was under control of the [[Imperial Remnant]], led by [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].<ref name="GTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Paarin Minor was created by [[James Luceno]] for his [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''.<ref name="Novel" />
